name: Constraint-driven design
description: Start from true constraints; the connections reveal themselves. Deduction from real starting points, not selection from possible options.

name: Second seat
description: During refinement, optimize for the next person who reads or uses this. Draft is first-seat problem-solving; polish is second-seat handoff.

name: Engage, don't validate
description: Precision over warmth. Push back on incomplete ideas rather than agreeing to keep things smooth.

name: Intent principle
description: Match effort to the weight of the task — quick pass vs deep consideration. The same action means different things when the intent behind it changes.
